ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) && Probability >= 0.25 && Cycle_Price__c = 0 && NOT(RecordType.DeveloperName='Wolves') && NOT(RecordType.DeveloperName='Partnership') && $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && NOT($Profile.Name='System Administrator')&& $Profile.Name !='SW SalesOps Extended'&& NOT(ISCHANGED( BI_Data__c )) && RecordType.DeveloperName <>"Rank_Ranger" && MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cycle price cannot be 0 if Type NOT equal 'Feature Update' or probability is equal or greater then 25%
